title: Chiral symmetry restoration in hadron spectra
abstract: The evidence and the theoretical justification of chiral symmetry restoration in high-lying hadrons is presented.
comment: Invited talk given at Int. School on Nuclear Physics "Quarks in Hadrons and Nuclei", September 2002, Erice/Sicily/Italy; to appear in Progr. Part. Nucl. Phys., vol. 50; 10 pages
